title: Source(engine: mysql).spec.mysql
description: Shape-only fragment (docs/planning/08 E5, docs/planning/03 §5): database is required — omitting it previously failed only at reconcile time, a validate-time-completeness gap this fragment closes (ADR 011). serverId is documentation-only (docs/planning/03 §5's hypothetical example); Debezium's own connector derives a stable server id from the connector name (debezium.serverID), never read from this block.
